goals: Add or tighten tests around an already approved code path.
Prefer test-only or test-first changes over production behavior changes.
Document uncovered risk that still remains after the test pass.
must_run: If browser flow coverage changed, run: cd frontend && npx playwright test <targeted-spec>
required_artifacts: list of tests added or updated
stop_conditions: Improving tests requires wide production refactoring.
The task needs migration or secret changes.
The requested scope crosses into protected domains without approval.
review_notes: Prefer adding tests around the real defect or risk, not broad harness churn.
If a production fix is needed, stop and open a follow-up contract.
